ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] 4thfever/cultivation-world-simulator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/4thfever/cultivation-world-simulator
Language: python
基于 AI Agent 工作流的修仙世界模拟器，旨在还原智能、开放的仙侠世界。| An open-source Cultivation World Simulator using Agentic Workflow to create a dynamic, emerging Xianxia world.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] nguyenphutrong/quotio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nguyenphutrong/quotio
Language: swift
Stop juggling AI accounts. Quotio is a beautiful native macOS menu bar app that unifies your Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Qwen, and Antigravity subscriptions – with real-time quota tracking and smart auto-failover for AI coding tools like Claude Code, OpenCode, and Droid.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/acuarica/evm
Language: solidity
A Symbolic Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) bytecode interpreter, parser and decompiler, along with several other utils for programmatically extracting information from EVM bytecode.
